predefined_questions.question: Hello
predefined_questions.answer: Hello! Welcome to our assistant. How can I help you today?

predefined_questions.question: Who are you?
predefined_questions.answer: I am a smart chatbot designed to help you navigate this website and answer your questions quickly.

predefined_questions.question: What is JBoss?
predefined_questions.answer: JBoss (now Red Hat JBoss Enterprise Application Platform) is an open-source application server used for building, deploying, and hosting Java applications.

predefined_questions.question: How do I integrate this chatbot?
predefined_questions.answer: You can integrate it by copying the script and CSS tags into your application's footer or master template, as detailed in our Integration Guide.

predefined_questions.question: What are your business hours?
predefined_questions.answer: Our standard business hours are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday through Friday.

predefined_questions.question: How can I contact support?
predefined_questions.answer: You can reach our support team via email at support@example.com or by calling our hotline at +1-800-555-0199.

predefined_questions.question: Is this chatbot powered by AI?
predefined_questions.answer: Currently, I am operating on a predefined set of questions and answers to provide fast and reliable support. AI capabilities can be enabled in the future.

predefined_questions.question: Does it work on mobile?
predefined_questions.answer: Yes! The chatbot widget is fully responsive and designed to work seamlessly on all mobile devices and tablets.

predefined_questions.question: What browsers are supported?
predefined_questions.answer: The chatbot supports all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.

predefined_questions.question: What if you don't know the answer?
predefined_questions.answer: If I can't find an answer to your question, please contact our human support team for further assistance.

predefined_questions.question: Where is my data stored?
predefined_questions.answer: Your interactions are handled locally on our secure JBoss server environment to ensure maximum privacy and security.

predefined_questions.question: Can I use it on multiple pages?
predefined_questions.answer: Yes, once integrated via the JBoss global filter or master template, I will be available on every page of your application.

predefined_questions.question: Thank you
predefined_questions.answer: You're very welcome! If you have any more questions, feel free to ask.
